title: NoName
description: A premium anonymous messaging platform allowing users to register, share unique profile links, and receive anonymous feedback. Features custom animated glowing backgrounds and a secure dashboard.

title: ChitChat
description: Real-time chat application with live WebSocket connections. Note: Backend is currently not live.

title: Meal Food
description: A simple e-commerce platform where users can browse, purchase products, add items to cart, and track status. Built using a public API.

title: Aedvik
description: A mentor and mentee booking platform built for a client. Mentors and mentees can connect, book appointments, and interact. Integrated payment gateway and Calendly third-party API service.

title: Feedback App
description: Built during a technical assessment for Kommonify Venture Pvt Ltd. Features a feedback collection and management system.
